initial_candidates.sql:
WITH yearly_sales AS (
    SELECT
        store.s_state,
        date_dim.d_year,
        SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS current_year_sales
    FROM
        store_sales
        JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
        JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE
        date_dim.d_date >= '2000-01-27'
        AND date_dim.d_date <= '2000-04-26'
        AND store.s_state IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY
        store.s_state,
        date_dim.d_year
)
SELECT
    current.s_state,
    current.d_year AS year,
    current.current_year_sales,
    CASE
        WHEN prev.current_year_sales IS NULL OR prev.current_year_sales = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (current.current_year_sales - prev.current_year_sales) / prev.current_year_sales
    END AS year_over_year_change
FROM
    yearly_sales current
    LEFT JOIN yearly_sales prev
        ON current.s_state = prev.s_state
        AND prev.d_year = current.d_year - 1
ORDER BY
    current.s_state ASC,
    current.d_year ASC
LIMIT 100;

WITH current_year_sales AS (
  SELECT
    store.s_state,
    date_dim.d_year,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS current_year_sales
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE date_dim.d_date >= '2000-01-27'
    AND date_dim.d_date <= '2000-04-26'
    AND store_sales.ss_store_sk IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY store.s_state, date_dim.d_year
),
year_over_year AS (
  SELECT
    c1.s_state,
    c1.d_year AS current_year,
    c1.current_year_sales,
    c2.current_year_sales AS prior_year_sales,
    CASE WHEN c2.current_year_sales IS NULL OR c2.current_year_sales = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE (c1.current_year_sales - c2.current_year_sales) / c2.current_year_sales
    END AS yoy_change
  FROM current_year_sales c1
  LEFT JOIN current_year_sales c2
    ON c1.s_state = c2.s_state
    AND c1.d_year = c2.d_year + 1
)
SELECT
  s_state,
  current_year,
  current_year_sales,
  prior_year_sales,
  yoy_change
FROM year_over_year
ORDER BY s_state ASC, current_year ASC
LIMIT 100;

WITH current_year_sales AS (
  SELECT
    s_state,
    d_year,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS current_year_sales
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE date_dim.d_date >= '2000-01-27'
    AND date_dim.d_date <= '2000-04-26'
  GROUP BY s_state, d_year
)
SELECT
  s_state,
  d_year,
  current_year_sales
FROM current_year_sales
ORDER BY s_state ASC, d_year ASC
LIMIT 100

WITH sales_by_state_year AS (
    SELECT
        store.s_state,
        date_dim.d_year,
        SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS current_year_sales
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_date >= '2000-01-27'
      AND date_dim.d_date <= '2000-04-26'
    GROUP BY store.s_state, date_dim.d_year
),
year_over_year AS (
    SELECT
        s1.s_state,
        s1.d_year AS year,
        s1.current_year_sales AS current_sales,
        s2.current_year_sales AS prior_year_sales,
        CASE
            WHEN s2.current_year_sales IS NULL OR s2.current_year_sales = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE (s1.current_year_sales - s2.current_year_sales) / s2.current_year_sales
        END AS year_over_year_change
    FROM sales_by_state_year s1
    LEFT JOIN sales_by_state_year s2
        ON s1.s_state = s2.s_state
        AND s2.d_year = s1.d_year - 1
)
SELECT
    s_state,
    year,
    current_sales,
    prior_year_sales,
    year_over_year_change
FROM year_over_year
ORDER BY s_state ASC, year ASC
LIMIT 100;

WITH current_year_sales AS (
    SELECT
        s_state,
        d_year,
        SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS current_year_sales
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE d_date >= '2000-01-27'
      AND d_date <= '2000-04-26'
    GROUP BY s_state, d_year
)
SELECT
    s_state,
    d_year,
    current_year_sales
FROM current_year_sales
ORDER BY s_state ASC, d_year ASC
LIMIT 100

WITH sales_by_state_year AS (
    SELECT
        store.s_state,
        date_dim.d_year,
        SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS current_year_sales
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_date >= '2000-01-27'
      AND date_dim.d_date <= '2000-04-26'
    GROUP BY store.s_state, date_dim.d_year
),
year_over_year AS (
    SELECT
        s1.s_state,
        s1.d_year AS year,
        s1.current_year_sales AS current_sales,
        s2.current_year_sales AS prior_year_sales,
        CASE
            WHEN s2.current_year_sales IS NULL OR s2.current_year_sales = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE (s1.current_year_sales - s2.current_year_sales) / s2.current_year_sales
        END AS year_over_year_change
    FROM sales_by_state_year s1
    LEFT JOIN sales_by_state_year s2
        ON s1.s_state = s2.s_state
        AND s2.d_year = s1.d_year - 1
)
SELECT
    s_state,
    year,
    current_sales,
    prior_year_sales,
    year_over_year_change
FROM year_over_year
ORDER BY s_state ASC, year ASC
LIMIT 100;

candidates.sql:
WITH sales_by_state_year AS (
    SELECT
        store.s_state,
        date_dim.d_year,
        SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS current_year_sales
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_date >= '2000-01-27'
      AND date_dim.d_date <= '2000-04-26'
    GROUP BY store.s_state, date_dim.d_year
),
lagged_sales AS (
    SELECT
        s_state,
        d_year,
        current_year_sales,
        LAG(current_year_sales) OVER (PARTITION BY s_state ORDER BY d_year) AS prior_year_sales
    FROM sales_by_state_year
)
SELECT
    s_state,
    d_year AS year,
    current_year_sales AS current_sales,
    prior_year_sales,
    CASE
        WHEN prior_year_sales IS NULL OR prior_year_sales = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (current_year_sales - prior_year_sales) / prior_year_sales
    END AS year_over_year_change
FROM lagged_sales
ORDER BY s_state ASC, d_year ASC
LIMIT 100

WITH sales_by_state_year AS (
    SELECT
        store.s_state,
        date_dim.d_year,
        SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS current_year_sales
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_date >= '2000-01-27'
      AND date_dim.d_date <= '2000-04-26'
    GROUP BY store.s_state, date_dim.d_year
),
lagged_sales AS (
    SELECT
        s_state,
        d_year,
        current_year_sales,
        LAG(current_year_sales) OVER (PARTITION BY s_state ORDER BY d_year) AS prior_year_sales
    FROM sales_by_state_year
)
SELECT
    s_state,
    d_year AS year,
    current_year_sales AS current_sales,
    prior_year_sales,
    CASE
        WHEN prior_year_sales IS NULL OR prior_year_sales = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (current_year_sales - prior_year_sales) / prior_year_sales
    END AS year_over_year_change
FROM lagged_sales
ORDER BY s_state ASC, d_year ASC
LIMIT 100
